news.Title: Elections are approaching
news.MainText: After opposition candidate XXX XXX withdraw only three candidates remain. The majority of the votes is expected to go to current president XXX XXX.
news.SecondaryText: As of yesterday third of the former five largest titanium mines in the entire solar system ran dry. In response Mining operations in the asteroid belt are to double in upcoming weeks.

news.Title: Terrorist group captured
news.MainText: The last operating members of the terrorist group formerly led by Roderick Sinclair were captured. Ending the hunt for the culprits behind assassination attempt on the president.
news.SecondaryText: Due to increase in small scale asteroid mining the price of titanium is already dropping. However prices of spare parts and fuel for single person mining modules are expected to rapidly increase.
news.SecondaryTitle: Is smale scale mining the future

news.Title: Life outside the solar system?
news.MainText: Mysterious transmission are being reported across the entire solar system. Scientists dont rule out possibility of intelligent alien life and say more research needs to be done.
news.SecondaryText: Pink mushrooms discovered on asteroid in sector 67 can potentially be refined into a form of fuel. This may possibly solve fuel shortages across all parts of the solar system.

news.Title: Warp ship hijacked
news.MainText: One of eight government ship capable of self warping was hijacked. Mysterious group attacked the port where the ship was docked and after neutralizing the crew escaped using the warp drive.
news.SecondaryText: Type of glowing fungi has been discovered. This fungi can be used to create polymer comparable to steel with fraction of the weight.

news.Title: President calls for delaying the elections
news.MainText: Yesterdays hijacking of a warp ship is a threat to the country and elections should be postponed until the matter is resolved. Said president XXX XXX to the press.
news.SecondaryText: National research institute succeeded in growing fungi found in sector 67. Production is now in full throttle and prices are dropping rapidly.
A mysterious message has been broadcast, claiming that empires gold reserves are running out. It contains details like yearly expenditure which gives it credibility.
In a press conference the Chairman of the National Treasury claimed that there is enough gold. He also said that they are investigating the information leak.
After thorough investigation the national treasury captured the source of information leak. The culprit was an employee that wanted to enrich himself.
